targets.rawSql:
SELECT topic, sum(metric_value) AS events_produced, max(observed_at) AS latest_observed_at
FROM ops_metrics
WHERE metric_name = 'events_produced_total'
  AND observed_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
GROUP BY topic
ORDER BY events_produced DESC;

SELECT service, metric_name, sum(metric_value) AS metric_total, max(observed_at) AS latest_observed_at
FROM ops_metrics
WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
GROUP BY service, metric_name
ORDER BY metric_total DESC, latest_observed_at DESC;

SELECT observed_at, service, source_id, topic, metric_name, metric_value, tags
FROM ops_metrics
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
